requirement_topic.en: EMC — IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 Evidence for PV Inverter Power Conversion Equipment
requirement_topic.zh: EMC——光伏逆变器功率变换设备 IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 证据
requirement_topic.zht: EMC——光伏逆變器功率轉換設備 IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 證據

summary.en: For El Salvador PV inverter projects, EMC evidence should be checked against the OSARTEC / OSN standards and conformity route, SIGET or distributor project specifications, and buyer or lender requirements. IEC 62920 is the dedicated EMC standard for photovoltaic power generating systems' power conversion equipment, and IEC 61000-series tests are commonly used for emissions, immunity, harmonics, and power-quality evidence. Where the inverter is grid-tied, EMC and harmonic evidence should align with the actual 60 Hz operating profile and the project connection voltage.
summary.zh: 萨尔瓦多光伏逆变器项目的 EMC 证据应按 OSARTEC / OSN 标准及合格评定路径、SIGET 或配电公司项目规格、买方或融资方要求进行核验。IEC 62920 是光伏发电系统功率变换设备的专用 EMC 标准，IEC 61000 系列测试通常用于排放、抗扰度、谐波和电能质量证据。逆变器并网时，EMC 和谐波证据应与实际 60 Hz 运行配置及项目接入电压相匹配。
summary.zht: 薩爾瓦多光伏逆變器項目的 EMC 證據應按 OSARTEC / OSN 標準及合格評定路徑、SIGET 或配電公司項目規格、買方或融資方要求進行核驗。IEC 62920 是光伏發電系統功率轉換設備的專用 EMC 標準，IEC 61000 系列測試通常用於排放、抗擾度、諧波和電能品質證據。逆變器併網時，EMC 和諧波證據應與實際 60 Hz 運行配置及項目接入電壓相匹配。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62920 — Photovoltaic power generating systems — EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment
IEC 61000 series — Electromagnetic compatibility test methods and limits
OSARTEC / OSN adopted standards and conformity route where applicable
SIGET or distributor project specifications where applicable

summary.en: Chinese PV inverter EMC files often rely on GB/T 37408 and related domestic laboratory reports. These may reference IEC 61000-style methods, but they are China domestic evidence and are normally produced around China 50 Hz operating conditions. They should not be assumed to satisfy IEC 62920, OSARTEC / OSN, SIGET, distributor, buyer, or lender expectations for a 60 Hz El Salvador project.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器 EMC 文件通常依赖 GB/T 37408 及相关国内实验室报告。此类文件可能引用 IEC 61000 式方法，但属于中国国内证据，通常围绕中国 50 Hz 运行条件形成。不应假定其满足萨尔瓦多 60 Hz 项目中的 IEC 62920、OSARTEC / OSN、SIGET、配电公司、买方或融资方预期。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器 EMC 文件通常依賴 GB/T 37408 及相關國內實驗室報告。此類文件可能引用 IEC 61000 式方法，但屬於中國國內證據，通常圍繞中國 50 Hz 運行條件形成。不應假定其滿足薩爾瓦多 60 Hz 項目中的 IEC 62920、OSARTEC / OSN、SIGET、配電公司、買方或融資方預期。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2019 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters) — includes EMC requirements
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: GB/T EMC reports do not automatically prove IEC 62920 or project-specific EMC acceptance in El Salvador. Exporters should provide model-specific IEC 62920 and relevant IEC 61000 reports from an accepted laboratory, confirm whether OSARTEC / OSN has adopted or required a Salvadoran version, and confirm whether harmonics or immunity evidence must be repeated or reviewed under the 60 Hz / 120-240 V project configuration.
gap.zh: 差距：GB/T EMC 报告不能自动证明符合 IEC 62920 或萨尔瓦多项目特定 EMC 接收要求。出口商应提供来自可接受实验室、针对具体型号的 IEC 62920 及相关 IEC 61000 报告，确认 OSARTEC / OSN 是否已采纳或要求萨尔瓦多版本，并确认谐波或抗扰度证据是否须按 60 Hz / 120-240 V 项目配置重新测试或审查。
gap.zht: 差距：GB/T EMC 報告不能自動證明符合 IEC 62920 或薩爾瓦多項目特定 EMC 接收要求。出口商應提供來自可接受實驗室、針對具體型號的 IEC 62920 及相關 IEC 61000 報告，確認 OSARTEC / OSN 是否已採納或要求薩爾瓦多版本，並確認諧波或抗擾度證據是否須按 60 Hz / 120-240 V 項目配置重新測試或審查。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where OSARTEC / OSN, SIGET, the distributor, procurement specification, lender, or project owner requires EMC evidence for the inverter model
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary or project-driven in many China PV inverter contexts unless tied to a Chinese certification, tender, or grid-connection requirement

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not treat a Chinese GB/T 37408 EMC certificate as a complete El Salvador EMC package. Confirm OSARTEC / OSN and project acceptance, then supply IEC 62920 and relevant IEC 61000 evidence for the exact inverter configuration and 60 Hz operating profile.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不应将中国 GB/T 37408 EMC 证书视为完整的萨尔瓦多 EMC 文件包。应先确认 OSARTEC / OSN 及项目接收要求，再提供针对准确逆变器配置和 60 Hz 运行配置的 IEC 62920 及相关 IEC 61000 证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不應將中國 GB/T 37408 EMC 證書視為完整的薩爾瓦多 EMC 文件包。應先確認 OSARTEC / OSN 及項目接收要求，再提供針對準確逆變器配置和 60 Hz 運行配置的 IEC 62920 及相關 IEC 61000 證據。
